# Extracao: transcription_mp4_31__Trait_30_-_Great_Salespeople_want_to_create_clients_for_a_lifetime_

- **Fonte:** transcription_mp4_31__Trait_30_-_Great_Salespeople_want_to_create_clients_for_a_lifetime_.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

Great salespeople want to create clients not for today. They want to create clients for a lifetime. They don't look at a guy, I just sold John. They look at John, the family, the cousins, the uncles, the aunts, all the possibilities, all his friends as relatives. They know every client is worth way more than just one deal or one paycheck. The greats have transitioned out of looking at what's in front of them and they're into multipliers. The greats don't want, they want one customer at a time. Treat them like one customer at a time but they're not thinking about one customer. They're thinking about lots of opportunities. They see every client as a potential of multiple sales, multiple incomes, not just one deal. Quit thinking about one deal. Quit looking at what's right in front of you and start using the multiplier of greatness that will get you to greatness.
